description: An exploration of the Nature Area's flora and Fauna- anything can happen! Our walk will discover what is occurring out in the park throughout the year- all dependent on the season of the program.

description: Students will learn about Native people, their connection to the land and natural resources, and traditional skills used by the Ohlone today.  Program includes hands-on activities and time outdoors.

metadata.title: Ohlone Culture Program | Tilden Environmental Education Center | East Bay Regional Park District
metadata.description: Students will learn about Native people, their connection to the land and natural resources, and traditional skills used by the Ohlone today.  Program includes hands-on activities and time outdoors.
